metaTitle: Build an author block email partial
description: Display author information with avatar, name, title, and signoff.
extendedDescription: Add a professional author signature block to your emails with avatar image, name, title, signoff message, and email address. Perfect for personalized transactional emails and newsletters.

metaTitle: Build a task item email partial
description: Display a single task item with title, status, and metadata.
extendedDescription: Render individual task items in notification emails for productivity and collaboration apps. Shows task details in a clean, structured format that matches your app's design.

metaTitle: Build a button with UTM link email partial
description: Create trackable links with UTM parameters for campaign analytics.
extendedDescription: Automatically append UTM parameters (source, medium, campaign, term, content) to your links for accurate campaign tracking in analytics tools. Essential for measuring email campaign performance.

description: Show social proof with a quote and image.
extendedDescription: Show social proof with a quote and image.

defaults.quote: Design is not just what it looks like and feels like.
defaults.name: Steve Jobs
defaults.title: Co-founder of Apple

metaTitle: Build a video cover image email partial
description: Add a clickable video thumbnail with play icon overlay to emails.
extendedDescription: Use this partial to turn a static image into a video teaser in your email layout. It overlays a play icon, supports responsive behavior, and links users to your hosted video or landing page.

metaTitle: Build a numbered list email partial
description: Show ordered steps, requirements, or recommendations in email.
extendedDescription: Use this partial to render up to five ordered items with numbered badges and consistent spacing. It helps teams add structured instructions, onboarding tasks, and ranked recommendations without rebuilding table-based email markup.

defaults.list_item_2: Add the channels your users prefer
defaults.list_item_3: Test the template with sample data

metaTitle: Build approve and reject email buttons
description: Add paired approve and reject buttons to decision-focused emails.
extendedDescription: Use this partial to give recipients two clear choices from a single email. It works well for review flows, access requests, moderation queues, and any workflow where users need to approve or reject an item.

metaTitle: Build a TLDR callout email partial
description: Highlight a short summary or key takeaway in an email.
extendedDescription: Use this partial to give readers a focused summary before they read the rest of an email. It supports a heading, paragraph text, and color treatment so teams can match the callout to the message context.

defaults.paragraph_text: We shipped several updates to help you get started with Knock faster.

metaTitle: Build a two-column content email partial
description: Show two side-by-side content blocks with images, text, and CTA links.
extendedDescription: Use this partial to compare two announcements, features, recommendations, or resources in a single email section. It pairs each item with its own image, heading, body copy, and CTA link while preserving responsive email markup.

defaults.block_1_paragraph_text: Start with a prebuilt content block, then customize the copy, image, and link.
defaults.block_2_paragraph_text: Pair each message with a clear CTA so readers know where to go next.
